summary: VenuLock UI/branding refinement testing complete. All 10 features tested PASS. Verified premium dark theme implementation with muted gold (#C8A960) palette. Mobile (390px): dark header, VL monogram, hamburger menu, 'We Talk. You Lock.' headline, dark search card. Desktop (1920px): dark header with VenuLock branding, Browse Venues/Sign In/Start Booking nav, hero with tagline badge, white elevated search card with city dropdown. All navigation links working correctly.

issues: Line 249 in index.css contains old comment 'DESIGN SYSTEM - BookMyVenue' - cosmetic only, not user-visible

action_items: Optional: Update CSS comment in /app/frontend/src/index.css line 249 from 'BookMyVenue' to 'VenuLock'
critical_code_review_comments: Muted gold (#C8A960) correctly replaced bright yellow (#F5C84C) across all visible UI elements
Dark header (#111111) properly implemented on both mobile and desktop
VL monogram logo with Poppins font correctly displayed in both viewports
Mobile search card is dark-themed (#1A1A1A bg) as specified
Desktop search card is white with elevated shadow as specified
Trust indicators minimal and premium (500+ Venues, Verified, Escrow Pay on mobile; Negotiation Included, Verified Venues Only, Real-Time Availability, Secure Transactions on desktop)
Top Performers section loading with 3 performer cards with muted gold accents
Footer correctly shows VenuLock branding with 'WE TALK. YOU LOCK.' tagline
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/branding refinement complete. Key changes verified: (1) Gold color: #C8A960 (muted), (2) Mobile: dark header + dark search card, (3) Desktop: dark header + white search card, (4) VL monogram in both viewports, (5) 'We Talk. You Lock.' headline with Poppins font, (6) Trust indicators minimal/premium, (7) All navigation working. Only cosmetic issue: CSS comment in index.css line 249 still says 'BookMyVenue' (not user-visible).
